summary: Frontend-only testing of Audix Counter Scanner App bug fixes. Both Bug 1 (items vanishing after submit) and Bug 2 (cross-location data contamination) have been VERIFIED AS FIXED.

bug_1.description: Location data vanishes from UI after submit
evidence: Submitted location (RT-SF) displays items in read-only mode
Console shows: '📥 Loaded 2 existing items from context (submitted: true)'
UI shows 'Location is submitted and locked' banner
Items displayed: Organic Rice 5kg (qty 37), Notebook A4 (qty 30)
Barcode input is disabled, delete buttons hidden in read-only view
bug_1.fix_verified: The composite loadKey (locationId_isSubmitted) and loading items for submitted locations works correctly

bug_2.description: Data duplication across locations when switching
evidence: Clicked Back, confirmed 'Yes, Go Back' to discard
Console shows: '🗑️ Cleared temp items for location loc_temp_...'
Selected WH-B-CS - it shows ONLY its own items (LED Bulb, Hand Sanitizer)
Rice Basmati from WH-A1 did NOT appear in WH-B-CS
Console shows: '📥 Loaded 2 existing items from context (submitted: false)' for WH-B-CS
bug_2.fix_verified: Synchronous localStorage save+clear on location switch prevents cross-contamination

test_scenarios_executed.name: Bug 2: Location switching with discard
steps: 4. Click Back, confirm 'Yes, Go Back' in discard dialog
6. Verify WH-B-CS shows ONLY its own items (LED Bulb, Hand Sanitizer)

test_scenarios_executed.name: Bug 1: View submitted location items
steps: 1. Navigate to location RT-SF (loc_4) that has items
4. Verify items are visible in read-only mode

success_rate.backend: N/A - backend testing skipped per request

seed_data_creation: Used existing mockData - WH-A1, WH-B-CS, RT-SF locations with their mock scannedItems
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both critical bugs are now fixed. Bug 1 fixed by composite loadKey including isSubmitted status. Bug 2 fixed by synchronous localStorage save+clear during location switch. The tempItemsOwnerRef tracking prevents cross-contamination. Test with rapid location switching to ensure no race conditions.

rca_of_the_issue.bug_1_fix_explanation: The load effect now uses a composite key (locationId_isSubmitted) to detect when a location is reopened. Items are loaded for BOTH submitted and non-submitted locations, with submitted locations displayed in read-only mode.
rca_of_the_issue.bug_2_fix_explanation: handleLocationScan now does SYNCHRONOUS localStorage.setItem for the old location before clearing tempScannedItems. The flushSaveItems with '___cancel___' sentinel clears pending debounced saves without writing data. tempItemsOwnerRef tracks data ownership to prevent cross-contamination.
